::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Apply Multiplication Rules
:::
::: lt-desc
Simplify expressions by adding powers when multiplying terms with the same base.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Same base]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Add exponents]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Index notation]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Apply Division Rules
:::
::: lt-desc
Simplify expressions by subtracting powers when dividing terms with the same base.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Same base]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Subtract exponents]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Fraction form]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Master Power of a Power
:::
::: lt-desc
Simplify expressions where a power is raised to another power by multiplying the exponents.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Brackets]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Multiply exponents]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Coefficients]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Manage Coefficients
:::
::: lt-desc
Multiply or divide numerical coefficients separately from the algebraic index laws.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Separate coefficients]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Multiply & divide]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Combined terms]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Handle Negative Indices
:::
::: lt-desc
Correctly work with exponents when calculations produce or involve negative indices.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Negative exponents]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Reciprocal]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Sign rules]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT6
:::
::: lt-title
Simplify Complex Fractions
:::
::: lt-desc
Combine multiple index laws to simplify multi-step algebraic fractions involving multiplication and division.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Multi-step]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Mixed laws]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Algebraic fractions]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT7
:::
::: lt-title
Operate with Surds
:::
::: lt-desc
Add, subtract, multiply, and divide surd expressions, including those with coefficients.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Add & subtract]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Multiply & divide]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Like surds]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT8
:::
::: lt-title
Simplify Surds
:::
::: lt-desc
Express surds in simplest form by identifying and extracting perfect square factors.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Perfect squares]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Simplest form]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Prime factors]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT9
:::
::: lt-title
Apply Surds
:::
::: lt-desc
Rationalise denominators and solve problems that require exact surd answers.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Rationalise]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Exact values]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Problem solving]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

:::
